svg.aria-label: CS undergrad at VIT (B.Tech, '27) working as a hands-on AI consultant out of a founder's office: I scope directly with leadership, pick the stack, then build, deploy, and operate production AI and automation systems across two FMCG companies — sales intelligence, production planning, supply-chain reconciliation, reporting. Quant research at JM Financial and full-stack fintech engineering behind it.

g.text: CS undergrad at VIT (B.Tech, '27) working as a hands-on AI consultant out of a founder's
office: I scope directly with leadership, pick the stack, then build, deploy, and operate
production AI and automation systems across two FMCG companies — sales intelligence,
production planning, supply-chain reconciliation, reporting. Quant research at JM Financial
and full-stack fintech engineering behind it.
